sourceText: Every difficulty bypassed will be a ghost that disturbs your rest later. Perfection is a monumental, daily discipline. Do not take shortcuts with your soul.

Shortcuts lead to shadows. A giant understands that monumental results require facing every micro-challenge with absolute focus. By refusing to ignore difficult details, you build an invincible foundation.
Nothing is more beautiful than a guitar, except perhaps two. Find monumental beauty in the singular and the shared. Honor your roots. Stay loyal to your heart.
Loyalty is your anchor. Your monumental power stems from your heritage and core mission; staying true to your origins and purpose keeps your spirit vibrant. Be a carrier of your own culture.
Accusations of corruption and imprisonment during his political career.
Achieved immortality through scholarly works and philosophical ideas.

Witnessing the brutal reality of my homeland being plundered by Japanese imperialism and the sacrifice of many comrades who fought for independence through armed struggle was a profound pain. During imprisonment, I endured severe torture and harsh conditions.

Even in prison, I did not lose sight of my ideals, authoring 'The Theory of East Asian Peace.' I steadfastly held onto my convictions for national independence and peace in East Asia, striving to leave hope for future generations.
Gender-based limitations in a patriarchal society, intense power struggles within the court, opposition and conspiracies from rivals, and tragedies involving her own children.
Exceptional political acumen, bold personnel policies, promotion of capable individuals, implementation of reformist policies, and seizing and maintaining power through strong will and determination.
Political persecution, suppression due to Catholic faith, exile
